title: Ancient underground labyrinths found in China
description: Archaeologists have discovered an extensive underground labyrinth system dating back approximately 4,000–4,500 years beneath the ruins of the ancient stone city of Houchengzui in northern China, AzerNEWS reports.

title: The ancient wood that began a wild revolution
Vedic Clocks Tracking Ancient 'Kaal Ganana' To Be Installed At Major Indian Shrines
description: A project to revive the ancient Indian system of ‘Kaal Ganana’ (time reckoning) through the unique concept of Vedic Clock has been launched by the Ujjain-based Vikramaditya Research Chair.
